retrieved_result: Flame retardants & PVC in electronics Brominated flame retardants (BFRs) and polyvinyl chloride (PVC) are both in a category of chemicals called halogenated compounds. Because this group of chemicals shares many traits and hazards, this section of our website looks at the whole category of chemicals. Halogenated compounds Halogenated or
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses flame retardants and PVC chemistry, not Docker or container setup.
